what_it_does: Defines a compact HTML preview card for the gold-circle icon family, with explanatory copy, a centered image sheet, and metadata for ring style, glyph color, sizes, and asset path.
observations: Loads shared styling from _card.css and adds file-local CSS for the card, lead text, image sheet, and metadata row.
Displays ../assets/icons/icon-library-gold-circles.jpg with alt text matching the icon set description.
Lead copy states that the icons use a thin gold ring with matching gold glyphs and are used as entity badges or system-component icons.
Metadata lists ring thickness, glyph treatment, supported sizes, and the source asset path.
The page is a standalone HTML document with inline styles and a single card as its body content.
standouts: Presents the icon family as both a visual sheet and a usage note.
Captures state-strength treatment through the described desaturation row.
Keeps implementation minimal: one stylesheet import, local CSS, one image, and short metadata.
conventions: Uses CSS custom properties from the shared card system for fonts, colors, surfaces, and radius.
Uses flex layout for the card structure and metadata row.
Keeps preview content static and file-local with no script.
Uses semantic-ish preview sections through simple class names: lead, sheet, meta.
concerns: The icon set is represented as one raster JPG, so individual icons are not addressable or described in markup.
The document does not include a viewport meta tag.
notes: A static design-system preview card documenting the gold-ring icon sheet and its intended badge/component use.
questions: Are the listed 32 / 48 / 64 sizes intended as rendered UI sizes, exported asset sizes, or both?
Is the desaturation row defined only by the image sheet, or is there a separate token/state rule elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: the file previews and documents the gold-circle icon family with visual and metadata context.
intention_signals: It seems intended to give designers or implementers a quick reference for recognizing, sizing, and applying the gold-circle icon family in system-oriented materials.
novelty: The file frames a visual icon sheet as a system-component badge family and explicitly ties desaturation to state strength.
contribution: Contributes a concise reference pattern for gold-ring entity icons, including visual presentation, usage context, sizing cues, and asset location for a fused design ledger.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML design-system preview for a gold-circle icon family, showing an image sheet and metadata about ring thickness, glyph treatment, sizes, and asset path.
intention_for_embedding: Created to document how the gold-circle icon family should be recognized and used as entity badges or system-component indicators.
